tool_input.summary: The PDS catalog does not contain a precomputed scalar value for the “downtail distance where statistical separation occurs” relative to Saturn’s reconnection X-line. To determine it you must (1) identify/label reconnection-related events (plasmoids, dipolarizations, tailward/planetward jets) from Cassini MAG and plasma measurements, then (2) compute each event’s downtail position (e.g., KSM/KSx or KRTP x) using the time tags and SPICE/coordinate context, and finally (3) perform the statistical separation vs. downtail distance yourself. Below are the most relevant PDS datasets (PDS4 and PDS3 where available) to reproduce such a study.

candidates.title: Cassini Magnetometer Calibrated Bundle
candidates.reasoning: Primary dataset for identifying reconnection signatures (field reversals, plasmoid-type Bx/Bz patterns, dipolarizations) and for using magnetotail coordinate systems at Saturn (KRTP/KSM/KSO/KSM mentioned in bundle description).

candidates.title: Cassini Magnetometer Raw Bundle
candidates.reasoning: Raw MAG data if you need to reprocess at full cadence or apply your own calibration/filters for event detection around the X-line.

candidates.title: CO E SW J S MAG 4 SUMM 1MINAVG V2.1
candidates.reasoning: PDS3 counterpart providing 1-minute averaged MAG summary data suitable for statistical surveys of tailward vs. planetward events as a function of downtail distance.

candidates.title: CO E SW J S MAG 4 SUMM 1SECAVG V2.0
candidates.reasoning: Higher time-resolution (1 s) MAG summary data for more precise timing of reconnection signatures and associated flows when binning by downtail distance.

candidates.title: CO E SW J S MAG 3 RDR FULL RES V2.0
candidates.reasoning: Full-resolution calibrated MAG (PDS3 RDR) for detailed event characterization and determination of whether an event is tailward/planetward of the X-line based on field topology/perturbations.

candidates.title: Cassini-Huygens Cassini Plasma Spectrometer (CAPS) Derived Bundle
candidates.reasoning: Plasma moments/derived products to help classify reconnection jets (planetward vs tailward flows), plasma sheet context, and to correlate flow direction with the inferred X-line location.

candidates.title: CO E J S SW CAPS 3 CALIBRATED V1.0
candidates.reasoning: PDS3 calibrated CAPS data for reproducing older Saturn reconnection surveys that combined MAG + CAPS to infer flow direction relative to the X-line.

candidates.title: Cassini CAPS Fitted Parameters Bundle
candidates.reasoning: Ready-made fitted plasma parameters (2004–2012) that can accelerate a statistical separation analysis without performing your own CAPS forward modeling.

candidates.title: CASSINI SPICE FILES
candidates.reasoning: SPICE kernels needed to compute Cassini’s position (and hence downtail distance, e.g., −X_KSM in Saturn radii) at each event time, ensuring consistent coordinate frames when separating planetward vs tailward populations.

parts.content:
You are a dataset-discovery assistant for the NASA PDS catalog (atm, geo, img, naif, ppi, rms, sbn nodes, ~12k datasets).

Tools are provided via MCP. You MUST call at least one search tool before returning results.

Interpret the user's science question, infer the relevant mission(s) and instrument(s), then search using mission/instrument keywords — not raw science terms alone. Return both PDS4 and PDS3 versions when available. Only return candidates you've seen in tool results — never invent IDs. Stay under ~10 tool calls. If nothing matches, return an empty list.
At what downtail distance does the statistical separation between events tailward and planetward of the Saturn's reconnection X line?

dataset.title: Cassini Magnetometer Calibrated Bundle
dataset.description: This bundle contains Cassini magnetometer calibrated data for the entire mission. The bundle includes 1 minute averaged and 1 second averaged data provided in Kronographic (KRTP, KSO, KSM) coordinates at Saturn, Geographic coordinates (GSE) for the Earth flyby, Jovigraphic coordinates for the Jupiter flyby, and RTN coordinates for the entire mission, and full time resolution data provided in RTN coordinates for cruise, Kronographic (KRTP) coordinates for Saturn Tour, Geographic coordinates (GSE) for the Earth flyby,and IAU_Jupiter (J3) and JMAG XYZ (JMXYZ) for Outer Cruise. A spice metakernel collection for the 1 minute averaged data is provided as well.

dataset.title: Cassini CAPS Fitted Parameters Bundle
dataset.description: This data set consists of all of the fits (both good and bad) that were found by Dr. Robert J. Wilson during the NASA Cassini Data Analysis Program grant (NNX12AG90G). The Cassini CAPS plasma data used in the forward model plasma parameter calculations given here came from volume CO-E/J/S/SW-CAPS-2-UNCALIBRATED-V1.0 in the Planetary Data System (PDS).
